text: U.S.-Iran Latest: Iranian drones target Bahrain after U.S. strikes Iran; Trump accuses Tehran of ceasefire violation - CBS News
fullText: The U.S. carried out retaliatory strikes against Iran on Friday after Iranian forces hit a cargo vessel in the Strait of Hormuz a day earlier.

text: After ousting Bill Cassidy, Donald Trump faces fresh test of his sway with GOP voters in Louisiana’s Senate runoff - CNN
fullText: Louisiana Republican voters already rejected an incumbent senator who was crossways with President Donald Trump. In a primary runoff on Saturday, they’ll decide whether to follow Trump’s lead in choosing a new nominee.

text: If a Lyme disease vaccine gets approved, how would it go over? We asked hunters - NPR
fullText: Drugmakers are working on a potential new shot to prevent the tick-borne illness. How might it fare in the era of vaccine skepticism?

text: Inside a secretive Ukrainian team launching deep drone strikes at Russia - NPR
fullText: Ukraine's long-range drones are striking deep inside Russia, up to 1,200 miles away, hitting oil refineries and depots. NPR recently spent time with one of the Ukrainian strike teams launching drones at Russian targets.

text: 4 ways to get creative with your leftovers (and save money on food) - NPR
fullText: Don't let your leftovers go to waste. Cookbook authors share clever storage techniques — like an "Eat Me First" box in your fridge — and cooking tricks to help you make the most of your food scraps.

text: Venezuela earthquakes kill 920 people as families desperate for news - BBC
fullText: Hundreds are still feared trapped under the rubble, as families desperate for news.

text: Burkina Faso cuts diplomatic relations with France, once a key ally - AP News
fullText: Burkina Faso's military government has severed diplomatic ties with France, its former colonial ruler and key security partner. The junta accused France of "blatant neo-colonial ambitions" and supporting subversive networks. France's Foreign Ministry expresse…

text: Pete Buttigieg recounts being separated from his children after bogus complaint - The Washington Post
fullText: The high-profile Democrat said he was unable to see his twins for 24 hours as police investigated the false report to child protective services. Michigan State Police confirmed they deemed the complaint unfounded.

text: U.S. government gives Anthropic green light for limited re-release of Mythos 5 - NBC News
fullText: The U.S. government is allowing Anthropic to deploy its Mythos 5 model to a select group of customers and partners, according to a letter from Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick to Anthropic that was seen by NBC News

text: No one seems happier about Mets manager Carlos Mendoza's firing than Mr. Met - Yahoo Sports

text: Utah declares emergency, limits fireworks ahead of July Fourth as crews battle largest U.S. wildfire - CBS News
fullText: Utah is restricting fireworks as the largest wildfire in the nation grows, fueled by dry conditions and gusting winds.

text: Saks officially emerges from Chapter 11 bankruptcy with less debt and a new name - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos

text: ‘Toy Story 5’ Looks To Cross $300M, ‘Supergirl’ Flying Low With $40M Opening – U.S. Box Office Update - Deadline
